GenAiFunction.description: Returns aggregate counts plus the most recent 10 records (visits, tasks, expenses) for a Doctor (Person Account) or Facility (Business Account), filtered to the running user. Pass recordId and runningUserId; optionally set timeWindow (default THIS_YEAR) and customDays for CUSTOM_DAYS. Records past the cap are still counted in the totals so the agent can answer "how many" accurately.
